verdicts.rationale: Matches analysis.findings tech:noindex-conflict exactly (count=3, pctOfPages=30, cluster /leistungen/*, same three affectedUrls); gemessen is correct since the headline claim is the measured count/pct.
Matches analysis.findings tech:sitemap-quality exactly (count=3, pctOfPages=30, cluster /fehler/*, same three affectedUrls); gemessen is justified by the measured count/pct.
Matches analysis.findings tech:robots-sitemap-conflict exactly (count=2, pctOfPages=20, same two affectedUrls) and correctly cites signals.robots.disallow=["/gesperrt/"]; gemessen is justified.

Matches analysis.findings tech:canonical-nonself exactly (count=4, pctOfPages=40, cluster /produkte/*, same four affectedUrls); gemessen is correct for the measured mismatch, and the finding appropriately flags the defect-vs-intentional ambiguity in auswirkung rather than overclaiming.
Matches analysis.findings tech:redirect-chain exactly (count=2, pctOfPages=20, cluster /alt/*, same two affectedUrls); gemessen is justified by the measured count/pct.

Matches analysis.findings crawl:orphan-page exactly (count=1, pctOfPages=10, cluster /verwaist/*, same affectedUrl) and correctly cites meta.coveragePct=83 to caveat the crawl-heuristic nature; gemessen is justified.
